creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #8)
> It really doesn't.
Been reading various feeds for the past couple of hours, works like a charm here (well, almost list a charm: I've hit two or three segfaults similar to https://github.com/Lallassu/gorss/issues/26).

> I suppose you also get ["repeated key" or something].
Hmm, didn't notice (maybe because I don't use tmux).

> TERM=screen-256color, I just happen to use tmux.
Okay, I'll check that combination.
